value.stringValue: There are no Picklists associated to this line.

assignments.name: Add_to_Drop_Ship_Error_Text
assignments.label: Add to Drop Ship Error Text

value.stringValue: Has no PO raised against it.

assignments.name: Add_to_Drop_Ship_Error_Text_PO_Approval
assignments.label: Add to Drop Ship Error Text PO Approval

assignments.name: Add_to_Drop_Ship_Error_Text_Status
assignments.label: Add to Drop Ship Error Text Status

value.stringValue: Full Quantity has not been shipped.

assignments.name: Copy_1_of_Add_to_Drop_Ship_Error_Text
assignments.label: Copy 1 of Add to Drop Ship Error Text

assignments.name: Copy_1_of_Add_to_Drop_Ship_Error_Text_PO_Type
assignments.label: Copy 1 of Add to Drop Ship Error Text PO Type

value.stringValue: PO type does not match SO line.
Order looks to be completed and ready to be pushed to invoicing.

rules.name: Check_for_Initial_Fault
rules.conditionLogic: (1 OR (2 AND 3) OR 4 OR NOT(5)) AND 6
rules.label: Check for Initial Fault

Flow.description: Updated to incorporate the invoicing team
Flow.label: Sales Order Invoice Checker

fields.name: ReadytoInvoiceText
fields.fieldText: Once you have reviewed the issues and are happy the errors are resolved or not problematic, tick this to flag with Invoicing that the Sales Order can be invoiced.

fields.name: MACD_Text
fields.fieldText: If there are multiple MACDs (Add, Move & Dispose) then you will need to generate the MACD for each.
